thoughts_testing_1657466087209.content: Tests that reference internal spy refs like `_gradebookSpyRef` on a module will fail if that property was never exported — always verify the property actually exists on the module before using it in t

facts_testing_1657467741543.content: When a spy ref is unavailable, the correct substitute is calling the actual service method directly (e.g., `PayloadGradebookService.getStudentGradebook()`) rather than trying to patch a non-existent e

conventions_srcservicespayload_165746884.content: Payload service methods are accessed via the class itself, not via module-level spy references — prefer direct class instantiation or static method calls in test setup.
